caption: The video presents a static educational slide for a course on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING," specifically for "Tutorial – 1." The slide features a mathematical formula for $y$ involving variables $h_1, h_2, h_f, h_g,$ and $\varepsilon$, with a given value of $\varepsilon_4 = 0.85$ displayed to the right of the equation. At the bottom of the screen, a banner identifies the presenter as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay." An NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom-left corner. Across the frames, the content of the slide remains completely unchanged. The only movement is a small white mouse cursor that drifts across the screen, appearing near the value of $\varepsilon_4$ in the first two frames and then moving toward the center of the slide in the final frames.
